evidence: We are continually innovating the design and development of our products, including by investing in artificial intelligence ('AI') tools and technologies, in order to enhance game play
This uncertainty may require additional investments in oversight and the development of protections and safeguards to ensure compliance

The growth of AI technologies in our industry has influenced game production for developers and gaming experience for players. The use and incorporation of these technologies are in the early stages of wider-spread commercial use
investing in artificial intelligence ('AI') tools and technologies, in order to enhance game play, anticipate changes in consumer behavior, and evolve our business

Any integration of any AI technologies into our products or services may result in new or enhanced governmental or regulatory scrutiny, litigation, confidentiality or security risks, ethical concerns, negative user perceptions

intellectual property ownership surrounding AI technologies has not been fully addressed by U.S. courts...use or adoption of third-party AI technologies may result in exposure to claims of copyright infringement

as artificial intelligence capabilities develop rapidly, individuals or groups of hackers...may use these technologies to create new attack methods that are increasingly automated, targeted, coordinated, and more difficult to defend against

limitations: ai_investment_intensity: No dollar amounts, headcount figures, or quantified AI-specific spend disclosed in the excerpts; investment language is qualitative only, limiting score to 3.
ai_narrative_concreteness: AI use cases named (game production, gameplay enhancement) but no deployment status metrics or quantified outcomes provided; early-stage language predominates.
capex_mentions: No AI-attributable dollar figures or quantified investment amounts appear in the excerpts.
